purpose: Candidate relational protocol crystal for mediating composition between partially compatible crystal sets without silent replacement or protocol collapse.

content_core.title: Adapter Candidate Crystal v1

nodes.label: framing translation
nodes.description: Translate weaker or differently structured framing assumptions into the receiving crystal set's framing discipline.

nodes.label: routing translation
nodes.description: Translate external routing assumptions into the receiving crystal set's layered routing structure without flattening it.

nodes.label: replaceability guard
nodes.description: Prevent role similarity from being treated as safe silent replacement of foundational crystals.

nodes.label: conflict isolation
nodes.description: Keep incompatibility local so composition does not corrupt the entire crystal set.

nodes.label: adapter trigger condition
nodes.description: Use an adapter only in the middle zone where direct composition is unsafe but rejection would discard useful reusable structure.

edges.description: Framing translation is activated when direct framing compatibility is insufficient.
Routing translation is activated when routing discipline differs but remains mappable.
Replaceability control helps keep adapter-mediated composition local and safe.

relation_paths: adapter trigger condition -> framing translation -> conflict isolation
adapter trigger condition -> routing translation -> replaceability guard

tensions.label: reuse vs dilution
tensions.description: An adapter should enable reuse without diluting the receiving system's discipline.

tensions.label: translation vs corruption
tensions.description: Too much translation can become hidden corruption of the receiving set.

tensions.label: bridge utility vs adapter sprawl
tensions.description: Adapters help composition, but too many can create a brittle intermediary layer.

unresolved_conflicts.label: adapter verification metric
unresolved_conflicts.description: How adapter success should be measured remains unresolved.

unresolved_conflicts.label: adapter lifecycle
unresolved_conflicts.description: Whether adapters should be temporary, versioned, or promoted remains unresolved.

unresolved_conflicts.label: adapter generation rule
unresolved_conflicts.description: How new adapters should be authored or induced remains unresolved.

source_anchors: require_adapter emerged from composition pressure test
adapter is the middle-zone object between compose and reject
adapter must preserve framing and routing discipline rather than flatten them
content_core.problem_space: How to mediate partially compatible crystal-set composition without direct composition, silent replacement, or forced rejection.
core_questions: What should an adapter translate and what should it refuse to translate?
How can an adapter preserve integrity while still enabling reuse?
When should adapter need collapse into outright rejection?
scope_limits: This is only a first candidate object for adapter logic, not a full adapter system.
This candidate should remain narrow and relational rather than becoming a generic compatibility catch-all.
